## Summary

What does this change add or improve?

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Quality checklist

- [ ] The skill solves a real German user problem.
- [ ] The folder is sorted by primary legal area.
- [ ] The folder name matches `name` in `SKILL.md`.
- [ ] The skill folder contains only `SKILL.md`.
- [ ] The description contains clear triggers.
- [ ] The skill explains what top work does better than standard work.
- [ ] Facts, assumptions, open points and legal evaluation are kept separate.
- [ ] Sources and review limits are not invented.

## Validation

Which checks did you run?
